extensionDescription.message: Records only the time you tap after taking a dose. It does not handle names, dosage, or effects.

purposeText.message: This saves only the time you tap the button to this device's Chrome storage. It does not handle names, dosage, or effects.

tapButtonDescription.message: Save the current time as a record.

onboardingGuideCopy.message: Right after taking a dose, tap the button above once to save that time as the latest record and show it in recent records.

emptyLatestRecord.message: After your first record, the latest time will appear here.

emptyHistoryRecords.message: After you record, your $COUNT$ most recent records will appear here.

clearButtonDescription.message: Delete all records saved on this device.

confirmClear.message: Delete all records saved on this device?

firstRunGuide.message: To start, tap the large button once right after taking a dose.

privacyNote.message: Nothing is sent outside this extension. Records are stored only in Chrome storage on this device.

premiumCopy.message: Premium is a one-time purchase of $PRICE$ and includes a $DAYS$-day trial. Recording works even when Premium is inactive.

storageError.message: Could not read or write saved data.
